programme.title: Forbidden Science - Love Doll
programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

As he pieces together clues from his past, he vaguely recalls his young daughter, who has been kidnapped. Meanwhile, Conner (Andy On, Zombie Fight Club), a former military operative turned gangster-for-hire, discovers that his wife has also disappeared mysteriously in the middle of the night. These two men, with little in common, realize they must work together to find their loved ones and thwart their mysterious abductors.

programme.title: Fast Vengeance
programme.desc: "Upon hearing of his brother's death, a man named Shen returns to his old stomping grounds to find the men responsible and take justice into his own hands. He learns that a biker named Cobra and his ferocious gang, The Midnight Squad, were the ones responsible ... but to get anywhere close to them, he must enter the dark, turbulent realm of underground motorcycle racing. Enlisting the aid of a drag racing champion-turned-mechanic, Shen must compete in the high-stakes races where he will have one chance to confront Cobra. But when Shen's plan is revealed, he must battle both on the streets and in the ring to obtain his final revenge. Featuring hip-hop legend DMX (Belly, Romeo Must Die), Fast Vengeance is a high-octane action thriller with style — and rubber — to burn."

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: In Episode 3, Josh starts off in the Twin Cities where he meets up with Yia Vang, an award-winning Hmong chef and restaurant owner, bringing his family’s traditions and flavors to the American Midwest. As Josh heads up north to Duluth and the boundary waters, he’ll meet plenty of farmers and foragers—harvesting mushrooms, wild rice, and catching a few fish (and waves) along the way. It all wraps up with an epic feast hosted by Yia back in the cities.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: New. York. City. That’s where our host Josh Rosen kicks off his journey in Episode 4—and where he lived for 16 years and started up the surf-centric apparel brand, Saturdays NYC. Back in his old stomping grounds, Josh first meets up with the award-winning chef and Mumbai native, Chintan Pandya, currently blowing up the New York food scene with his unapologetic and authentic Indian cuisine (pro tip: try the goat brains). Next, Josh travels through the boroughs, heads upstate, and along the coast to source local ingredients—from sake brewers and pig farmers to catching fresh lobster just 100 miles from Wall Street. As always the adventure will end with a feast, right back in Chintan’s kitchen.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank: Part Two
programme.desc: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.

Former big-wave World Tour Champion Grant ‘Twiggy’ Baker from South Africa, Hawaiian’s Mark Healey and Billy Kemper along with Australian Ryan Hipwood and Tasmania’s Mikey Brennan, were locked in for the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep104

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s overhaul day on Boom America, and the A-Team gets to work. Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail kick things off with Switch It Up, laying out strategies around “The Volume” while Kyle Reyes pushes for a powerful pivot—refocusing the company squarely on the booming trades community. Next, the team digs into Raida Tech, where Laura highlights how the company is operating 25 years ahead of the curve but desperately needs clearer marketing to match its groundbreaking innovation. American Stories creator Bob Cefail stops by to share the inspiration behind Boom America and the future of independent production in the U.S. From there, the A-Team turns to Tangible Assets, helping refine how Dale can monetize his coin collection business, boost credibility, and reach the right investors. Finally, New Home National Title gets a full diagnostic from the experts as they map out how the company can scale, gain visibility, and earn the recognition it deserves nationwide.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights will face their biggest challenge yet. There be giants.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: In part one of the season finale, Laura is immersing herself in all the wonders that are TomKat ranch. Created by Kat Taylor and Tom Steyer, TomKat ranch is part ranch, part laboratory, part educational facility and all around the American Dream. This ranch is doing their part at spear-heading the rural revitalization that will bring about climate stability and a healthier planet.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The stakes continue to climb as Green Light Sights rewards one top shooter with their very own custom weapon—proof that precision pays off. But there's no time to celebrate. Bear Arms ups the ante by issuing defense vests to every contestant, with one hard rule: once it’s on, it stays on. From grueling mission briefings to body armor plank challenges that push endurance to the brink, the weight—literally and mentally—never lets up. Still armored, the team reports to Ken Shamrock for another brutal dose of Lion’s Den physical punishment. Just when they think they’ve caught a break, Compliant Technologies’ infamous glove makes a shocking return to torment a fresh round of contestants. And as the day winds down, Don introduces the team to his personal “Flights” challenge—an unforgiving test no one is excited to take on. It all ends with a sobering CIA reminder: in the field, your backstory might just save your life—or end it.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The episode opens with Michael Bellemare of Switch It Up Inc., who shares how a simple bar-napkin sketch grew into a million-dollar operation specializing in turnkey solar, LED lighting, and EV charging. With a passion for revitalizing the trades, Michael stresses the importance of training programs and investing in people as he maps out his goal of scaling to a $100M company—and even explores franchising with Kevin. Next, teacher-turned-inventor Sean Worthington introduces Raida Tech, where a bathtub question—“What is money?”—led to a new form of data-supremacy currency and safer, uncensored AI. Sean looks to the A-Team for marketing, sales, and customer acquisition support. Then, Dale Krueger of Tangible Assets LLC explains how his coin-collecting hobby evolved into an investment platform blending art and assets, now ready to scale beyond word-of-mouth investors. Finally, Richard Simon of New Home National Title showcases his on-call title insurance service and seeks guidance on breaking into TV advertising to reach homebuyers nationwide.

programme.title: Sequoia & Kings Canyon National Parks
programme.desc: Step into a world of ancient giants. This cinematic journey travels deep into the heart of the southern Sierra Nevada, where the largest trees on Earth stand as silent sentinels of time. Witness the filtered golden light of the 'Giant Forest,' the rugged granite canyons of the Kings River, and the quiet, mist-filled meadows that lie in the shadow of these wooden titans. An immersive experience designed to bring the scale and serenity of the High Sierra's most majestic groves into your home.

programme.title: Son of the Renegade, 1942
programme.desc: The son of a notorious outlaw grows up unaware of his father’s criminal past. As he comes of age, he is drawn into a conflict between lawmen and outlaws, forcing him to confront the truth about his heritage. Struggling between loyalty and justice, he must decide whether to follow in his father’s footsteps or forge his own path on the side of the law.

programme.title: That Girl – S1:E1: Don’t Just Do Something, Stand There
programme.desc: Aspiring actress Ann Marie moves to New York City to pursue her career, determined to make it on her own despite her father’s concerns. As she searches for opportunities, she gets her first taste of the challenges and independence of show business life.

programme.title: Idaho Kid (1960)
programme.desc: A tough, straight-shooting cowboy known as the Idaho Kid rides into a lawless frontier town and finds himself caught between ruthless outlaws and desperate townsfolk. As tensions rise, he must use his wits and gun skills to bring order and protect the innocent, all while confronting his own past.

programme.title: Range Warfare (1935)
programme.desc: A cowboy returns to his hometown to find it under the control of a ruthless gang, and sets out to expose their crimes and restore order with the help of loyal allies

programme.title: The Lone Ranger TV Show - War Horse
programme.desc: Cowboy Classics

programme.title: Lights of Old Santa Fe
programme.desc: Rival rodeos are operated by good guy Gabby and bad guy Richard Powers. Dale is trying to choose between them, aided ultimately by Roy and the Sons of the Pioneers (who are radio singers).

programme.title: Without Honors (1932) Colorized
programme.desc: “In Without Honors, cowboy star Richard Arlen rides into a frontier tangled in treachery and deceit. Framed for a crime he didn’t commit, he must fight to clear his name and expose the outlaws behind the scheme. With tense drama, blazing action, and a touch of romance, this early Western delivers a rugged tale of courage and justice won the hard way.

programme.title: The Trusted Outlaw 1937
programme.desc: In The Trusted Outlaw, cowboy star Bob Steele delivers action and grit as a reformed outlaw trying to walk the straight path. But when a ruthless gang frames him for crimes he didn’t commit, he’s forced back into the saddle to clear his name. With fast-paced gunfights, high-stakes drama, and Steele’s trademark toughness, this Western proves that sometimes it takes an outlaw’s courage to bring true justice to the frontier.

programme.title: Death Rides a Horse
programme.desc: A young gunfighter bent on killing the four bandits who raped and murdered his family crosses paths with a former outlaw, who hopes to extort the same men in revenge for getting him jailed.

programme.desc: You can’t have Sacramento without the Kings, and you can’t have the Kings without some seriously delicious grub. Chef Sara Arbabian is up against Chef Greg Desmangles to serve up an upscale take on their favorite courtside dishes.

programme.title: Wait, What Happened?: Robots Do the Darndest Things
programme.desc: Frank Nicotero quizzes people in New Orleans about a starchy substance in a bathtub, animal mysteries and robots that do the darndest things.

programme.title: Local Love: Selective Single Getting Creative to Find Love
programme.desc: Randi, a 29-year-old single from Omaha, is ready to date three lovely ladies. Will she find a connection with Karen, will Leia pull all the right heartstrings or will things get spicy with Emily?
